body: This PR adds a dataloader for the MAC LWP dataset and updates the `pressure_levels.jl` calibration config to use LWP.
title: Add MAC LWP dataloader

body:
with the new ClimaOcean (0.10) we also have a snow model attached to the sea ice by default.
This PR wires in the snow model
- the top temperature we solve for is the snow temperature
- the resistance for temperature computation is the resistance in series $\kappa^{snow} / h^{snow} + \kappa^{ice} / h^{ice}$
- we reroute the snowfall to increase the snow layer above sea ice
title: wire in the snowfall
